Parochial
community + nation
→ Local soup kitchen
(common-sense default)

Humanitarian
all present humans
→ GiveWell top charity (AMF)
(Alexander Berger)

Farmed
animals count
→ The Humane League
(Peter Singer, Lewis Bollard)

Future
people count
→ ALLFED ▼
(Ajeya Cotra, Toby Ord)

Nuclear war
non-negligible
→ ALLFED
(Carl Sagan, Martin Hellman)

Astronomical
stakes
→ AI safety (Redwood Research)
(Nick Bostrom, Eliezer Yudkowsky)

Boltzmann brain
hedonic solipsism
→ Local soup kitchen (all equal)
(Ludwig Boltzmann)

Moral anti-realism
nothing matters
→ Local soup kitchen (all negative - keep your money)
(J. L. Mackie)
